items.title: NEET re-test results 2026: 12 students from Tamil Nadu score above 690
items.summary: This year’s NEET results have indicated an increase in cut-off marks to the tune of about 30 to 35, compared to last year.

items.title: Who is the frontrunner to be the UK's next chancellor?
items.summary: Andy Burnham will be moving into Downing Street next week, and a question remains over who will be his neighbour in Number 11.

items.title: U.S. Hits Bridges and a Port in Southern Iran as Airstrikes Expand
items.summary: Rail and road connections were reportedly struck as Washington seeks to weaken Tehran’s grip on the Strait of Hormuz. Iran retaliated by firing on American military facilities i...
